steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The student’s notes contrast the materials of two sculptures: *Through* uses "forged steel", while *TTI London* uses "weathering steel". This specific material difference is the only detail that directly emphasizes a distinction between the two artworks.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice C directly references the contrast in steel types, aligning with the material difference in the notes. The other three choices either omit the material detail (A, B, D) or present general statements irrelevant to the distinction. That matches choice C — C is correct.
